<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. Please fill out the sections below so reviewers can land
this quickly. Feel free to delete sections that genuinely don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- "Closes #123" / "Related to #456" / "N/A" -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tooling / CI / build
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Implementation notes

<!--
Walk a reviewer through the change. Highlight any non-obvious decisions, trade-offs,
or follow-ups that did NOT make it into this PR.
-->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, include before/after. Drop GIFs or short MP4s for interactions. -->

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (required for editor / viewport / persistence changes)
- [ ] Manually verified the affected flow in the browser
- [ ] Manually verified inside Electron (`npm run electron:dev`), if relevant

## Breaking changes / migrations

<!--
Did you change any storage keys, custom event names, DnD MIME types, public API,
or on-disk format? If so, describe the migration path or why a clean cut is acceptable.
Use "None" if nothing here applies.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] My code follows the project's conventions (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] I have added tests covering my change, or there is a clear reason I haven't.
- [ ] I updated `README.md`, in-source docs, or other documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] No new `console.log` or debugger statements are left behind.
- [ ] License-incompatible third-party code is **not** included (see `LICENSE`).
- [ ] I am happy to license this contribution under AGPL-3.0-or-later (per `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
